activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Arithmetic
activities_projects.objective: Perform arithmetic operations using Roman numerals
steps: Write Roman numerals for numbers from 1 to 50
Choose two Roman numerals and add them without converting to Hindu-Arabic numbers
Verify the answer by converting to Hindu-Arabic numbers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands arithmetic in Roman number system

activities_projects.title: Base Number System Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Understand number systems with different bases
steps: Write numbers from 1 to 20 in the decimal system
Convert them into base-5 representation
Explain the pattern observed in base-5 numbers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of number bases

activities_projects.title: Ancient Number System Comparison
steps: Choose three number systems such as tally marks, Roman numerals and Hindu-Arabic numerals
Represent numbers 1 to 10 in each system
Compare which system is easier for calculations

activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Solve number puzzles using Roman numerals
steps: Create five puzzles using Roman numerals
Exchange puzzles with classmates
Solve the puzzles and explain the solutions

activities_projects.title: Base-5 Arithmetic Activity
steps: Write numbers in base-5 representation
Add and subtract two base-5 numbers
Convert results back to decimal for verification

activities_projects.title: Number System Timeline Research
activities_projects.objective: Explore the development of number systems
steps: Research early number systems like Egyptian, Roman and Hindu-Arabic
Create a timeline showing their development
Add key mathematicians and discoveries

activities_projects.title: Design a New Number System
activities_projects.objective: Create a custom number representation system
steps: Design symbols for numbers 1 to 10
Create rules for representing larger numbers
Demonstrate addition using your system

activities_projects.title: Large Roman Numeral Representation
activities_projects.objective: Represent large numbers in Roman numerals
steps: Write numbers like 256, 789 and 1999
Convert them into Roman numerals
Explain the grouping process used

activities_projects.title: Counting System Investigation
steps: Observe counting systems used in different cultures
Write examples such as counting in groups of 2 or 5
Explain advantages and limitations

activities_projects.title: Decimal vs Other Bases Project
activities_projects.objective: Compare decimal system with other base systems
steps: Choose two base systems such as base-5 and base-10
Write numbers from 1 to 20 in both systems
Explain differences and similarities
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands place value in different bases
